summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LOTO 3D Training app. Backend APIs working perfectly (6/6 tests passed), menu screen functions correctly, but critical issue found: 3D simulation screen fails to load after clicking Start Simulation button.

critical_bugs.issue: Simulation screen fails to load after clicking 'Start Simulation' button
critical_bugs.symptoms: App remains on menu screen, no Three.js canvas renders, no HUD/tools visible
critical_bugs.tested_scenarios: All 3 scenarios (Diesel Generator, Air Compressor, Conveyor Belt)
critical_bugs.root_cause: Screen state not updating from 'menu' to 'simulation', preventing SceneManager and HUD components from rendering

integration_issues.issue: Three.js canvas and interactive elements not rendering
integration_issues.impact: Complete blockage of core 3D training functionality

passed_tests: Menu screen loads with correct title and subtitle
3 scenario cards display correctly (Diesel Generator, Air Compressor, Conveyor Belt)
Scenario selection highlights card with yellow border
Start Simulation button enables after scenario selection
Backend API endpoints all working: GET /scenarios, POST /simulations, PATCH /simulations, GET /results
Error handling for invalid simulation IDs (404 response)
Scenario data structure correct (names, descriptions, steps, difficulty)
Audio manager utility present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix screen transition from menu to simulation. The handleStartSimulation function in App.js is not updating the screen state to 'simulation', preventing the 3D training interface from loading. Check for JavaScript errors, React state issues, or API call failures in the simulation creation flow. This blocks access to all core 3D functionality including Three.js canvas, interactive hotspots, and training simulation.
